title: Level Up Lounge
description: Wild Hare Bar Garden transforms into the Level Up Lounge, a retro gaming-inspired Comic-Con pop-up featuring pixel-art décor, themed cocktails, local craft beer, themed food, and interactive photo opportunities.
notes: Open daily during Comic-Con week from 11:00 AM–11:00 PM. No SDCC badge required. Walk-ins welcome on a first-come, first-served basis.

title: Ten Forward at Le Charcuterie Bar
price: Food & Drinks for Purchase (10% Off with SDCC Badge or Costume)
description: Celebrate Comic-Con with themed décor, Star Trek wines, themed charcuterie boards inspired by franchises like Star Trek and Star Wars, interactive tabletop games, and exclusive character stickers with purchase while supplies last.
notes: Receive 10% off when wearing a Comic-Con badge or costume. Featured drinks include Château Picard wines and alcohol-free Synthehol from Star Trek Wines. Games include Star Wars trivia, Marvel Tarot Cards, Star Trek three-dimensional chess, and Lower Decks Buffer Time.

title: Ignition Pavilion Happy Hour
location: Ignition Pavilion at San Diego Wine & Culinary Center
description: The Seven Seas coffee bar transforms into the Ignition Pavilion Happy Hour featuring themed cocktails, beer, wine, mocktails, and Ignition Proof Rum.
notes: Complimentary drink tickets available with qualifying purchases.

title: Ignition Press Pavillion
location: Ignition Pavilion at San Diego Wine & Culinary Center
description: Visit the Ignition Pavilion for a free fan experience featuring comics, collectibles, live shopping broadcasts, creator appearances, exclusive merchandise, coffee, and interactive exhibits. Highlights include the eBay Live selling lounge with livestreams throughout Comic-Con, appearances by comic creators Bill Sienkiewicz and Jim Lee, rare comic displays from Rene Nezhoda, the debut of an exclusive DC x eBay Live connecting cover, the Comic-Con debut of lifestyle brand Revenge Of, and complimentary drinks from Seven Seas Roasting Company for eligible guests while daily supplies last.
notes: Limited to the first 200 guests each day.

title: Doctor Who: Worlds of Wonder Exhibit
address: 2131 Pan American Plaza, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Explore props, costumes, interactive exhibits, and displays examining the science and history behind Doctor Who.
notes: Runs daily Tuesday through Sunday during Comic-Con week.

title: Thom Tran & The Comedy Nerds
description: Stand-up comedy showcase hosted by Thom Tran featuring Eddie Pence, Jen Saunderson, Martin Morrow, and Josh Snyder.
notes: Featured performers include Eddie Pence (The Ralph Report), Jen Saunderson (America's Got Talent), Martin Morrow (B4 The Bell Wrestling Podcast), and Josh Snyder (Oberth Class).

title: The Walking Dead: Dead City Season 3 Advance Screening
description: Attend an advance screening of The Walking Dead: Dead City Season 3 alongside members of the cast and creative team.
notes: Hosted at The Loft at Petco Park. Complimentary concessions and exclusive giveaways included with admission. Advance RSVP required through 1iota.

title: Super Troopers 3 Pop-Up
description: Visit the Super Troopers 3 pop-up for complimentary pancakes, interactive activities, themed displays, giveaways, and merchandise.

title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants Outdoor Screening
address: 200 W Island Ave, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Outdoor screening of The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants as part of Nickelodeon's Fun Flows Here programming.

title: Nickelodeon's Fun Flows Here
address: 200 W Island Ave, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Family-friendly Nickelodeon activation featuring interactive experiences, games, live entertainment, themed photo opportunities, slime activities, and character-inspired attractions.
notes: Outdoor screening of The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants begins at 7:00 PM.

title: Alliance Authentic Pop-Up
description: Browse preserved vinyl records, collectible figures, convention exclusives, and enter giveaways at the Alliance Authentic pop-up.
notes: Free Handmade by Robots figure available for Comic-Con badge holders while supplies last.

title: Artist Gus Fink "Kreepy Cuddles" Treasure Hunt
description: Take part in an interactive treasure hunt as artist Gus Fink releases clues leading to original artwork, collectible prizes, and a live painting finale in the Gaslamp Quarter.
notes: New clues are released every 20 minutes on Instagram and TikTok. Original artwork, SDCC-exclusive collectibles, and a $500 cash prize available.

title: Percy Jackson and the Olympians Experience
description: Explore an interactive experience inspired by Percy Jackson and the Olympians featuring multiple themed paths based on characters from the series.

title: Adelyn Grace "The Wretched Divine" Release Event
description: Invite-only release celebration for Adelyn Grace's novel, The Wretched Divine.
notes: Invite only.

title: Gungnir Books x Laugh Factory Party
description: Evening event featuring comedy, author signings, books, and science fiction-themed programming for guests with a qualifying book purchase.
notes: Admission requires a qualifying Gungnir Books purchase made on or after July 10.

title: Star Trek Fleet Command Community Party
description: Invite-only community event for Star Trek Fleet Command players and invited guests.
notes: Invite only. Time TBD.

title: Toy Tubers Unite @ Nite 2026! Presented by Mondo
description: Spend the evening bowling, playing games, winning prizes, and meeting some of the biggest toy creators on YouTube during this fan-favorite Comic-Con celebration presented by Mondo.
notes: Presented by Mondo.

title: Mosh Eisley
description: Dance the night away at this Star Wars-inspired emo and punk party featuring themed music, cosplay, and galactic vibes for fans from every corner of the galaxy.

title: Karaoke Night! @ Punch Bowl Social
description: Grab the mic and sing your favorite hits during Punch Bowl Social's weekly karaoke night, complete with drink specials, arcade games, and a free arcade card with your first drink purchase.
notes: $7 wells, $5 shots, $6 draft beer, $3 Red Bull and Liquid Death starting at 9 PM.

title: IGN Party
description: One of Comic-Con's most sought-after invite-only parties, featuring live entertainment, gaming, special guests, and exclusive experiences hosted by IGN.

title: TOKiMONSTA Rave
description: Experience an electrifying late-night DJ set from Grammy-nominated producer TOKiMONSTA as she brings her signature blend of electronic, hip-hop, and house music to NOVA.

title: Rooftop Cinema: How To Lose a Guy in 10 Days
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Watch the beloved romantic comedy under the stars from the Rooftop Cinema Club, complete with wireless headphones and panoramic views of downtown San Diego.
notes: Rooftop Cinema Club moved to Little Italy.

title: Kevin Smith's Fatman Beyond
description: Join filmmaker Kevin Smith for a live recording of his fan-favorite podcast featuring Comic-Con discussions, pop culture commentary, celebrity guests, and audience interaction.

title: Comics On With Jay & Silent Bob
description: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes take the stage for a live show packed with comic book conversations, behind-the-scenes stories, audience Q&A, and the irreverent humor fans expect from Jay & Silent Bob.

title: Fictional Roast: Super Mario Bros
address: 750 Sixth Avenue 2nd Floor San Diego, CA 92101
description: Watch stand-up comedians transform into Mario, Luigi, Princess Peach, Bowser, Yoshi, and other Mushroom Kingdom favorites for a hilarious character roast filled with sharp insults, gaming references, and audience laughs.

title: Rooftop Cinema: Moulin Rouge
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Enjoy Baz Luhrmann's dazzling musical romance beneath the stars with wireless headphones and rooftop views at Rooftop Cinema Club in Little Italy.

title: Rooftop Cinema: Sinners
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Catch a late-night rooftop screening of the supernatural thriller *Sinners* while enjoying open-air seating, wireless headphones, and skyline views in Little Italy.

title: Star Trek Fleet Command: 60 Years of Star Trek Archives Experience
description: Celebrate 60 years of Star Trek through an interactive archive featuring official memorabilia, a Holodeck VR experience, themed photo opportunities, interactive games, exclusive giveaways, and a personalized souvenir card based on your chosen Starfleet faction.
notes: A special invite-only Star Trek Fleet Command community event takes place Friday evening. This activation is not affiliated with San Diego Comic-Con.

title: Star Trek: Boldly Built Activation
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Visit an interactive Star Trek experience celebrating the franchise alongside LEGO and Magic: The Gathering with themed displays and photo opportunities.
notes: Open Thursday through Sunday.

title: Pan's Labyrinth Fetch Quest
description: Take part in a free citywide scavenger hunt celebrating the 20th anniversary of Pan's Labyrinth by searching for three iconic characters hidden throughout the convention area.
notes: Participants search for one evil character, one pure of heart, and one 'with a name only the wind and the trees can pronounce.'

title: Pan's Labyrinth 20th Anniversary Party
description: Celebrate the 20th anniversary of Pan's Labyrinth with an evening featuring a film screening, themed entertainment, happy hour, and a DJ performance by Flying Lotus.
notes: Features happy hour, a screening of Pan's Labyrinth, and a live DJ set by Flying Lotus.

title: AREA 619 Speakeasy @ barleymash
description: Enjoy a themed Comic-Con menu at AREA 619 featuring specialty food, drinks, and access to the invite-only Space Smugglers Cantina cocktail lounge for guests with the daily password.
notes: DM @barleymashsd for the secret password. Special menu includes the Zoidberg-er, Drax-A-Roni & Cheese, Pizza Planet Pockets, and Experiment 626 dessert.

title: NUTRL Promo Event
description: Stop by The Blind Burro for complimentary NUTRL samples, branded giveaways, and a custom hat decorating station while supplies last.
notes: Choose your hat, choose your patches, and have them professionally heat-pressed while supplies last.

title: Poké Puffs @ Cafe de l'Opera
description: Pick up Pokémon-inspired Poké Puffs available in multiple flavors and tiers while supplies last during Comic-Con weekend.
notes: Available Thursday through Sunday while supplies last.

title: Garage Kitchen + Bar Super Deals
description: Take advantage of Comic-Con dining specials throughout the day, including brunch, burger deals, happy hour discounts, and drink specials.
notes: $20 Bottomless Mimosa Brunch (11 AM–3 PM), $6 Crazy Bob's Burger & Fries (11 AM–12 PM & 3 PM–4 PM), Happy Hour with 51% off drinks and $3 off appetizers (4 PM–6 PM).

title: Pokémon Pop-Up Bakery
description: Browse a selection of Pokémon-inspired baked goods, specialty pastries, and themed treats created for Comic-Con weekend.
notes: Available while supplies last.

title: Spill the Beans Comic-Con Specials
description: Enjoy Comic-Con-themed coffee drinks, pastries, and seasonal menu items available throughout convention weekend.

title: Cloak & Petal Marvel Menu
description: Order a limited-time Marvel-inspired food and cocktail menu created exclusively for Comic-Con visitors.

title: Diamond Room Lunch Specials
description: Take advantage of Comic-Con lunch specials featuring discounted food and drink options during convention week.

title: Ghostbusters After Party
description: Ghostbusters fans gather for an evening of themed entertainment, cosplay, photo opportunities, and community celebration following Comic-Con programming.

title: Lunar Landing Bar
description: Visit a space-themed pop-up bar serving specialty cocktails and convention-inspired beverages throughout Comic-Con weekend.

title: Osteria Panevino Comic-Con Specials
description: Enjoy special food and beverage offerings created for Comic-Con guests at Osteria Panevino.

title: Lanterns Training Headquarters
description: Step into an interactive experience inspired by DC's Lanterns, featuring themed activities, photo opportunities, and fan experiences.

title: STUART FAILS TO SAVE THE UNIVERSE
description: Step inside Stuart Bloom's comic shop from The Big Bang Theory in this immersive HBO Max experience inspired by Stuart Fails to Save the Universe. Explore multiple realities, interactive environments, and discover your own hero archetype through a story-driven adventure.
notes: Features portal walkthroughs, interactive story moments, hero archetype experiences, photo opportunities with a replica machine from the series, exclusive merchandise, and personalized collectible takeaways. Open to the public while capacity allows.
tags: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe

title: Marvel Contest of Champions
location: Marvel x Moonrock Gaming Lounge at the Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101 (San Diego Ballroom)
description: Play Marvel Contest of Champions with hands-on demos, compete in daily tournaments, explore the new Towers game mode, and earn exclusive convention giveaways throughout the day.
notes: No SDCC badge required. Play the Towers demo to receive an exclusive pin and a spin on the prize wheel for in-game rewards and physical prizes. Experienced players can qualify for the daily on-stage tournament by posting one of the four fastest demo times.

title: The Silo Experience
description: Journey inside the mysterious world of Apple TV+'s Silo through an immersive, multi-sensory experience that recreates the atmosphere, mystery, and tension of the acclaimed sci-fi series.
notes: Free and open to all San Diego Comic-Con attendees and the general public. Hours listed as 11:00 AM–7:00 PM (schedule subject to change).

title: SDCC Gaming Lounge
location: Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina – San Diego Ballroom
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Spend the day exploring San Diego Comic-Con's official gaming lounge with console, PC, and tabletop gaming, tournaments, live demos, partner activations, and interactive experiences for players of all skill levels.
notes: Features the Naruto Mythos TCG with a daily tournament, stage programming, and merchandise. Experience Avatar: Legends with 25 PC gaming stations, two daily tournaments, autograph/sign stations, QR codes for wishlists and purchases, and social media activations. Alienware will showcase gaming laptops, interactive game demos, and a special stunt experience.

title: Peanuts x Super7 Pop-Up
address: 200 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Celebrate Peanuts with Super7 at this interactive pop-up featuring themed displays, exclusive collectibles, character photo opportunities, and family-friendly activities inspired by Snoopy and friends.
notes: Features the Adopt-a-Puppy experience with exclusive 8-inch Super Duper Plush collectibles, adoption certificates, puppy bandanas created with Best Friends Animal Society, Comic-Con exclusives, Snoopy & Lucy mascot photo opportunities, giveaways, and surprises.

title: Paramount+'s The Lodge
price: Free - Ticketed - Sold Out, Stand By Available
description: Explore Paramount+'s immersive Comic-Con experience featuring themed environments, interactive activities, exclusive experiences, and fan favorites inspired by multiple Paramount franchises.
notes: Standby line available if tickets remain.

title: Princess Donut Food Truck
description: Visit Audible's Dungeon Crawler Carl food truck for complimentary themed donut holes, exclusive merchandise, and limited-edition giveaways inspired by Princess Donut.
notes: Free donut holes inspired by Dungeon Crawler Carl, including 'Goddamnit, Donut!', 'Samantha's Head', and 'The Desperado Glaze.' Audible merchandise and giveaways available while supplies last.

title: Wattpad Presents: The Fandom Writing Club
description: Join fellow writers, fanfiction creators, and storytellers for an evening of writing prompts, creative workshops, community discussions, and special guest appearances hosted by Wattpad and Den of Geek.
notes: Features timed writing sprints, a Den of Geek magazine publication contest, an appearance by Wattpad author E.M. Wilson with signed advance copies of Break Up For Two, and one complimentary beer for attendees who show their Wattpad account. Strictly 21+. Government-issued ID required. Bring a laptop, notebook, or phone to participate.

title: Robert A. Heinlein Blood Drive
description: Donate blood during Comic-Con at the annual Robert A. Heinlein Blood Drive, a long-running community tradition supporting the San Diego Blood Bank.
notes: Appointments made through the official registration page.

title: IGN: Brisk x Splatoon Raiders Pop-Up
description: Try hands-on demos of Splatoon Raiders on Nintendo Switch 2 while enjoying themed activities, complimentary beverages, arcade-style games, and exclusive promotional giveaways.
notes: Free iced tea and arcade water-gun games.

title: Petco Interactive Zone
description: Explore Petco Park's free Interactive Zone featuring fan activations, shopping, themed displays, photo opportunities, and experiences from brands including Hello Kitty, Labu'Tique, MaruMart, and KAYOU.

title: Ignition Press Room Pavilion
description: Visit Ignition Press's Comic-Con pavilion to browse creator signings, comic book releases, exclusive merchandise, giveaways, and interactive fan experiences throughout the weekend.

title: Marvel Games Lounge
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Play Marvel video games, participate in gaming activities, and experience interactive Marvel titles throughout Comic-Con.
notes: Comic-Con badge required.

title: Stern Pinball Pop-Up Arcade
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Play Stern Pinball machines featuring licensed themes while exploring free-play tables, tournaments, and convention-exclusive activities.

title: Hulu Animayhem
description: Step into Hulu's animated worlds through interactive experiences, themed environments, exclusive giveaways, photo opportunities, and activities inspired by popular animated series.

title: DreamWorks' Forgotten Island Advance Screening
description: Be among the first audiences to watch an advance screening of DreamWorks Animation's Forgotten Island before its theatrical release.

title: Adult Swim on the Green
address: Behind the San Diego Convention Center
description: Spend the afternoon and evening at Adult Swim's outdoor festival featuring interactive attractions, games, giveaways, themed photo opportunities, live entertainment, and nightly programming.

title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Demo
description: Play the latest Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 content with hands-on demos at Bandai Namco's Comic-Con booth.
notes: Comic-Con badge required.

title: Clash of Clans
address: 849 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Test your skills in an interactive Clash of Clans experience featuring themed physical challenges, puzzles, and activities inspired by the hit mobile game.
notes: Tickets on sale July 1.

title: Comic-Con Donut Bar
address: 401 W A St, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Comic-Con-themed specialty donuts are available throughout convention week while supplies last.
notes: Arrive early. Popular items frequently sell out before noon.

title: Pendry Hotel Donut Bar
description: Comic-Con-themed gourmet donuts are served each morning during convention week.

title: PopUp Bagels Volkswagen Bus
description: Fresh-baked PopUp Bagels are served from the company's Volkswagen Bus each morning while supplies last.
notes: Arrive early. Frequently sells out.

title: Kitties and Coffee for Comic Con
description: Reserve a 50-minute visit to enjoy a menu item while spending time with adoptable cats at The Cat Cafe during Comic-Con week.
notes: Reservations recommended.

title: Candyland Cafe
description: Visit a Candy Land-inspired pop-up featuring themed desserts, interactive elements, and colorful photo opportunities.

title: Superhero Tea at The Westgate Hotel
description: Enjoy a Comic-Con-themed afternoon tea featuring specialty teas, themed desserts, and event décor.
notes: Reservations required.

title: False Idol x Geeki Tiki Event
address: 675 W Beech St, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Celebrate the 10th anniversary of Geeki Tikis during a themed event featuring specialty drinks, collectible merchandise, giveaways, raffles, and limited-edition releases.
notes: Three timed sessions. Guests may attend only one session. Tickets sold separately.

title: My Little Pony Mochi Pop-Up Cafe
description: Stop by a My Little Pony-themed café serving colorful mochi desserts, specialty drinks, themed treats, and exclusive merchandise inspired by the beloved franchise.

title: Comic-Con Themed Bar Crawl
description: Visit participating Gaslamp bars during this Comic-Con-themed crawl featuring themed stops, exclusive drink specials, and opportunities to meet fellow fans throughout the evening.

title: Chuck Jones Gallery Pop-Up & Artist Meet & Greets
address: 809 W Harbor Dr, Seaport Village, San Diego, CA
description: Browse original artwork, limited-edition prints, and special exhibits while meeting featured artists during the Chuck Jones Gallery Comic-Con pop-up.

title: David Baron's 5th Annual Bar Con
description: Annual Comic-Con networking meetup where fans, creators, and industry professionals gather in an informal setting.

title: SDCC Away Team Tiki Meet Up
location: Omni San Diego Hotel at the Ballpark
description: Annual Star Trek fan meetup where attendees gather for a tiki-themed afternoon during Comic-Con.
notes: Star Trek attire is appreciated but not required. Final event time is still pending and may be updated.

title: One Piece Cosplay Gathering
description: Group cosplay meetup and photo session for One Piece fans and cosplayers.
notes: All One Piece cosplayers and fans welcome.

title: Doctor Who Quiz Night
description: Doctor Who-themed trivia night featuring prizes and hosted by BBC Hollywood correspondent Sandro Monetti.

title: Comic-Con Oral History Project
description: Learn about the history of San Diego Comic-Con through interviews, archival materials, and historical discussion.

title: Disney Lorcana Pre-Release
description: Play and preview the newest Disney Lorcana release during this prerelease event.
notes: Convention badge required.

title: Adult Swim on the Green: Live Table Read with Rick and Morty President Curtis
location: Bayfront Park - Behind the Convention Center
description: Adult Swim's Friday evening programming features a live table read centered on President Curtis from Rick and Morty as part of the free Adult Swim on the Green entertainment lineup.
notes: DJ Dance Party follows from 9:00 PM–10:00 PM.

title: Adult Swim on the Green: Cosplay Dance Party
location: Bayfront Park - Behind the Convention Center
description: Wrap up the evening with Adult Swim's outdoor cosplay dance party featuring music and a celebration of fan costumes following the night's entertainment.

title: Funko Fundays: Quest for the Grail
description: Funko's annual Fundays celebration returns with an evening of exclusive collectibles, interactive games, entertainment, and special surprises for ticketed attendees.

title: Riftbound: Vendetta Pre-Rift Event
description: Participate in a sealed Riftbound trading card event featuring Vendetta: Blood Brothers with organized rounds of gameplay and community competition.

title: Den of Geek: Science Meets Pop Culture Live Podcast
description: Join Den of Geek for a live discussion exploring science, fandom, and pop culture with special guests during Comic-Con weekend.

title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise
description: Alternative rock band Rainbow Kitten Surprise performs live at Gallagher Square during Comic-Con weekend.

title: David Koechner Comedy Show
address: 8878 Clairemont Mesa Blvd, San Diego, CA
description: Actor and comedian David Koechner performs a live stand-up comedy show during Comic-Con weekend.
